issues_ranked.title: Primary category & services keywords
issues_ranked.why: HVAC searches are split (furnace repair, AC install, heat pump rebate). Thin or generic services let map-pack rivals capture high-intent clicks.
issues_ranked.where: Google Business Profile → Edit profile → Business category → Services

issues_ranked.title: Business description & attributes
issues_ranked.why: Shoppers decide in seconds. Missing Bryant dealer, gas licence, 24/7 emergency, and financing in the first screen loses trust to competitors who spell it out.
issues_ranked.where: Edit profile → Business information → Description · Attributes

issues_ranked.title: Q&A, posts & review replies
issues_ranked.why: Unanswered “same-day?” and “licensed?” questions plus stale posts signal an inactive profile — Google and customers deprioritize you even with strong stars.

competitor_note: Central Okanagan HVAC is crowded. Your review volume is a moat — pair it with complete services, suburb keywords, and weekly posts to defend map visibility.
